user_story: I hold @papanda's creator coin (0x4eaa88d8739306a68a723ff061c89a0739fbe2ce) and want to liquidate my entire position back to ZORA. Sell flow: V4 swap with zero_for_one flipped, Permit2 one-time approval for the coin (because we're spending ERC-20 input, not ETH).

turns.prompt: Look up Zora creator @papanda's profile and their personal creator coin (the one at 0x4eaa88d8739306a68a723ff061c89a0739fbe2ce — distinct from their 'zora' trend coin). Get the pool key and current price.

DRY-RUN — validate the call shape, assume I hold the coin and have set up Permit2 (don't bail on zero balance). Activate the zora skill.
